symbols: seven saints gathered — the communion of saints across the ages
description: A panel showing seven standing saints in richly colored robes with golden halos. Each figure holds distinctive attributes. The style is characteristic of 15th-century Florentine panel painting by Filippo Lippi.
theological_description: The gathering of saints represents the communion of saints (HEB.12.1). Each saint embodies a different charism, demonstrating that the Body of Christ is diverse yet unified (1CO.12.12-27). Their halos signify participation in the divine light: 'the righteous will shine like the sun in the kingdom of their Father' (MAT.13.43).

scripture_refs.reason: The righteous shining like the sun
